lines.speaker: Elder Kelmo
lines.text: Hello there. I'd be careful of upsetting the gryphons in here. These ones so far don't seem to be too aggressive. We'd prefer to keep it that way.

lines.speaker: Elder Kelmo
lines.text: You can, but only if you have permission. We still want to keep them in check, but we don't want to go overboard and make them angry.

lines.speaker: Elder Kelmo
lines.text: Wait! These gryphons do not currently pose a threat to us. You shouldn't attack them without permission!
